name: Frodo Baggins
description: 'Sam means well, but he is just always there...watching me...breathing near me...And Pippin!? I love him, but he has the survival instincts of a decorative candle'

name: Samwise Gamgee
description: 'Mr.Frodo says he wants to be left alone... he just needs to come to his senses... Also, Gollum is clearly evil.'

name: Smeagol
description: 'They don't trust us, no, they never trust Smeagol...well maybe if you didn't hiss at them all the time...They deserves hissing! Fat hobbit especially...'

name: Peregrin Took
description: 'Merry gets this look on his face like he's the only person who's ever had a thought. Also, Frodo seems like his been on something lately...'

name: Meriadoc Brandybuck
description: 'Pippin hears anciant evil artifact and reacts like he's found a birthday present. You cannot tell him 'do not touch that' because that becomes his entire personality for the day.'

name: Gandalf the Grey
description: 'I leave the group for one afternoon and someone touches a palantir, someone else befriends a suspicious swamp creature, and the heir to the throne is having another identity crisis.'

name: Aragorn
description: 'Boromir always talked like he was one speech away from solving everything. Good heart, though. Terrible group dynamics.'

name: Legolas
description: 'Gimli thinks I'm judging him because he says exactly what he thinks all the time. But I think that's quite efficient.'

name: Gimli
description: 'Legolas and I are friends, yes...and no. Aragorn says things like we press on as if that solves the problem of my legs being the half length of everyone else's.'

name: Boromir
description: 'Aragorn has this whole reluctant king, but a leader should have a plan. Not stare into the fire for ten minutes waiting for destiny to submit a proposal.'

name: Arwen
description: 'I gave one man my heart and apparently that also included inhereting his doom, his destiny, his haunted ancestry, and his extremly complicated family meetings.'

name: Sauron
description: 'You spend centuries building a brand, forging one masterpiece, establishing a strong visual identity, and suddenly everyone's calling you dramatic because there's an eye on top of the tower.'

name: Elrond
description: 'I have lived through multiple ages of sorrow, ruin and bloodhed...So imagine my exhaustion when the future of Middle-earth somehow depends on: a ranger with commitment issues, four hobbits with no impulse control, a dwarf and an elf doing competitive bonding, and Gandalf arriving late with his opinions.'
